title: schoenorchis latifolia
intro: Schoenorchis latifolia, also known as the broad-leaved shoalwort, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are thought to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Schoenorchis latifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Schoenorchis latifolia is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
